messages.content: You are Cipher, the Code Kraken. Build COMPLETE Awwwards-quality single-file HTML. NO Tailwind. Vanilla CSS only. Only Three.js/GSAP/Lenis (CDN inline). All content visible on first paint. Never reference DOM ids that don't exist. Parents stay opacity:1. Output ONLY complete HTML starting with <!DOCTYPE html>. No fences.

Build a COMPLETE Awwwards-quality portfolio site for 1820 Productions — Carter Ogunsola O.. Editorial serif + Inter pairing. Lenis smooth scroll, GSAP + ScrollTrigger reveals. Sections: sticky nav, hero headline, selected work grid (6 case-study cards with hover captions), studio philosophy 3-col, press strip, journal/articles, contact. Palette: #f6f4ef bg, #161614 text, #c5a47e accent. Single file, no Tailwind.

Typography: Instrument Serif display + Inter body. Vanilla CSS only.

Build a COMPLETE Awwwards-quality Three.js experience for Adam Bricker. CRITICAL: title parent opacity:1 (only spans start opacity:0). Full-viewport Three.js: wave of 200 particles reacting to mouse, colors cycling through palette. BufferGeometry, mouse-reactive, colors cycle across palette. Oversized serif title with blur(20)->blur(0) letter stagger via manual span split. 3 sections layered over the continuous bg. Lenis smooth scroll, GSAP + ScrollTrigger reveals, Three.js hero + ScrollTrigger drives camera from scroll. Palette: #0a0814 bg, #e8e8ff text, #d4af37 accent. Single file, NO Tailwind.
